HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ALDO NOBOA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. ALDO NOBOA HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 05, 2008:
Jonathan L. Alba, attorney for plaintiff; Hali Reiskin, Esquire, by limited scope limited scope representation for defendant Aldo Noboa, who is also present

Settlement conference is held; case is settled. The parties have entered into a signed agreement which is not filed with the court this day. June 9, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
